summary: The user is planning a birthday party for their mom next month, focusing on a Personalized & Sentimental theme. They are incorporating their mom's favorite dishes, including chicken parmesan and chocolate chip cookies, and are seeking ideas for a signature drink, menu, and party favors.
facts: The user is planning a birthday party for their mom next month. The user has chosen a Personalized & Sentimental theme for the party. The user plans to include their mom's famous chicken parmesan and signature pasta salad in the menu. The user will have a dedicated dessert station featuring their mom's famous chocolate chip cookies. The user has selected the Parmesan Pomegranate Punch as the signature drink for the party. The user will offer a non-alcoholic version of the Parmesan Pomegranate Punch for guests who don't drink. The user is considering party favors such as homemade cookies, pomegranate-themed items, and Italian-inspired favors. The user is interested in creating a "Wall of Love" for guests to write notes and messages to their mom. The user is planning a "this is your life" style presentation to celebrate their mom's life at the party.
